halt_gates_passed: credential_resolvable: no DEP has credential_status='user must provide now'
no_cred_filename_in_committed_files: aicore_API.txt redacted from contract.html; path lives only in gitignored .env
every_third_party_substrate_has_dep_row: SUB-7 SAP AI Core -> DEP-1; SUB-6 (observability v1) -> DEP-3 Langfuse (deferred to S4)

project.name: Document AI Self-Improvement Flywheel
project.build_layout: Vite SPA: app/ at repo root holds artifacts; src/ at repo root holds application code

substrate.choice: DAEJOO PDF at app/assets/daejoo-invoice.pdf + deterministic JSON fixtures in src/data/demoScenario.ts and src/evals/cases/*.json
substrate.reason: The PDF is the anchor document and the JSON fixtures are the canonical extraction surface; both must live in-repo so the demo is reproducible and the eval suite is hermetic.

substrate.choice: In-memory typed fixtures + pure service functions; no database
substrate.reason: v1 is a single-operator deterministic demo; persistence beyond process memory would reshape the eval surface without adding demo value.
UI5 Web Components React delivers the SAP Fiori embedded-app feel without SAP BTP deployment, and Vite gives a fast local dev loop.

substrate.choice: Local dev only via vite dev
substrate.reason: The demo runs on a developer laptop in under five minutes; shared hosting in v1 would introduce auth and rollout decisions that are not load-bearing.
No multi-user surfaces in v1; auth would force a workspace permission model the demo does not need.

substrate.choice: Browser console + in-memory QualityMetric log surfaced in Internal Product Intelligence + Vitest eval report
substrate.reason: Agent failures must be logged as QualityMetric per A5 and rendered in the Internal workspace per the flywheel; Vitest output covers the eval surface.

substrate.choice: SAP AI Core (live calls for every agentic step: compile, capability assessment, readiness reasoning, clarification generation, admin recommendations, signal governance)
substrate.reason: Every agentic step is a live AI Core call per HAPPY-3 and A1; only OCR + raw extraction are mocked per N6. AI Core API contract details remain OQ-1.

screens.name: Customer Workspace
components: Business-intent input form (ShellBar + TextArea + submit Button)
Compiled configuration panel (Card with schema fields, instructions, validation, regex, thresholds, processing mode)
Capability status panel: Supported / Supported with workaround only
Clarification loop: 3 prompts per missed field (field meaning · posting/review/reporting impact · supplier-scope applicability)
Readiness panel with 5-key reasons: field · evidence · rule · confidence · nextAction

screens.name: Admin Control Plane
components: Prompt version management (Tabs or List + version diff)
Field-level threshold management (visible as a tool; never recommended action)
negative_contract_guards: never include 'lower the threshold' in any rendered recommendation

screens.name: Internal Product Intelligence
components: Feedback governance queue (CorrectionEvent -> ProductSignal gating UI)
Product quality telemetry (QualityMetric log table — covers SUB-6)
Capability gap analytics ranked by frequency, customer impact, document type, supplier, country
DAEJOO material-disposal phrase surfaced HERE ONLY as signal_type: unsupported_free_text_business_condition
screens.containment: any signal hidden from Customer / Admin lives here, governed and ranked, never leaks back

dependencies.name: SAP AI Core (eu-central-1 production)
dependencies.purpose: Live OAuth-backed LLM calls for F-04/F-05/F-06/F-07/F-10/F-15 + token refresh
dependencies.access_mechanism: OAuth2 client-credentials flow against XSUAA url from service key

credential_storage.policy: Service-key file is never copied into repo, never written to .env, never echoed to logs; its filename and absolute path are never named in any committed file (env var is resolved at runtime from gitignored .env).
credential_storage.validation_at_boot: fail-fast if AICORE_KEY_PATH unset, path not readable, or parsed JSON missing keys: serviceurls.AI_API_URL, clientid, clientsecret, url

rules: calls missing either MUST throw before dispatch
default model SHOULD be the smallest viable (e.g. anthropic--claude-3.5-haiku via AI Core deployment id)

dependencies.name: FMP API
dependencies.purpose: Carry-over from prior workshop scaffolding; not used by v1 Document AI build
dependencies.notes: Listed for completeness; v1 Document AI flow does not call FMP. Safe to ignore but do not delete from .env (downstream sessions may reference).

dependencies.name: Langfuse Cloud
dependencies.purpose: Observability for live agent traces (S4 OBSERVE) — out of scope for v1 build, recorded here for S4 handoff
dependencies.access_mechanism: API keys from .env (LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY + LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY, currently absent)
dependencies.notes: NOT a blocker for S3 build. New keypair: cloud.langfuse.com -> Settings -> API Keys -> Create, then paste into .env. LANGFUSE_BASE_URL preserved as breadcrumb.

dependencies.name: frontend-design skill
dependencies.purpose: Layout + visual hierarchy for every UI surface (3 workspaces × ~6 panels each)
dependencies.access_mechanism: Skill invocation per screen; pass structured content, let skill own typography/layout

dependencies.name: claude-api skill
dependencies.purpose: Tune AI Core client (prompt caching, retries, schema-enforced JSON, token budgeting)
dependencies.access_mechanism: Skill invocation when authoring aiCoreClient.ts and per-agent prompts

dependencies.name: verify skill
dependencies.purpose: Post-build verification pass over S3 output before claiming completion
dependencies.access_mechanism: Skill invocation at end of S3 build

lint_rules_specific_to_this_build: no-restricted-imports: forbid any literal containing '~/Downloads' or 'Downloads/aicore' in source (enforces N8 + F-14)
no-restricted-syntax: forbid string literal 'Unsupported' inside any file under src/routes/customer/ or src/components/customer/ (enforces N1)
no-restricted-syntax: forbid regex /lower(ing)?\s+threshold/i match in any file under src/domain/generateAdminRecommendations.ts output or src/components/admin/ (enforces N2)

agent_client_contract.interface: callAgent({ agent, model, max_tokens, system, user, expect_json_schema? }) -> Promise<AgentResult>
must: load credentials via process.env.AICORE_KEY_PATH at boot; fail-fast if unreadable
obtain OAuth token via client-credentials flow against XSUAA url; cache token in memory only until expiry
reject any callAgent invocation missing { model } or { max_tokens }
stamp every AgentResult with { agent, source: 'aiCore', templateUsed: false, latency_ms, token_usage }
on failure (timeout / network / non-2xx / unparseable JSON when expect_json_schema is set), throw AgentFailure { agent, reason, raw } -- F-08 then converts to ClarificationRequest + QualityMetric
must_not: never substitute a canned fallback response (N4)
never log or persist the service key, the OAuth token, or AICORE_KEY_PATH's resolved value
never echo system or user prompts back into the rendered DOM (enforced by F-10 5-key constraint)

default_models.compile_or_reasoning_heavy: anthropic--claude-sonnet-4 (only when smallest_viable insufficient; document rationale per call)

build_protocol.feature_iteration_order: respect depends_on graph in feature-list.json; F-01 first, F-20 last; within each layer pick lowest F-id

per_feature_commit.message_format: S3.CODER F-NN: <feature name>\n\n<one paragraph: what changed, why, which kill-switch metric>
must_include: feature status flipped to 'done' in app/feature-list.json

build_protocol.status_lifecycle: todo -> doing -> done; doing is set BEFORE work begins, done is set ONLY after acceptance check passes
halt_behaviors: if a per-unit kill switch trips: exit 3 + log to claude-progress.txt + leave feature status at 'doing'
if a required credential is missing at build time: halt and ask, do not stub
if Screens guidance is ambiguous on a feature: halt and ask
if a substrate row not listed here is needed: halt and ask
if a feature needs a dependency with credential_status other than 'have' or 'runtime_load': halt and ask
build_protocol.claude_md_update_policy: touch app/CLAUDE.md §2 Durable Tenets ONLY if a tenet that survives a model swap surfaced; most features add nothing
build_protocol.session_close: after the last feature lands, append a single session-level RATIONALE entry to claude-progress.txt summarizing features built, kill switches tripped, and any open follow-ups for S4

OQ-1.question: AI Core API contract details (auth model, endpoint shape, rate limits, JSON contract)
blocks: F-04 first run of compile agent against live tenant
OQ-1.resolution_window: must be resolved during F-04 build window (20 min kill switch)

OQ-2.question: Governance thresholds for CorrectionEvent -> ProductSignal promotion
OQ-2.resolution_window: must be resolved before F-09 begins; Coder halts at F-09 if thresholds not provided

OQ-3.question: Auto-confirm threshold values per field (supplier, PO, invoice date, payment terms, payable amount)
OQ-3.resolution_window: must be resolved before F-07 begins
